segment.source: An intro heading and subheadline above a list of route cards, each with a map-pin icon, a transport-mode title, and rich-text directions. Use it for: 'how to reach us' sections, arrival instructions by car, train, bus, or plane, parking notes, venue-access details on contact, location, or event pages. Prefer 'Map Embed' for an interactive map; use 'Office Locations' for listing multiple sites.
